issues.description: Action should trash THIS CHARACTER (the card itself), not from hand. Should be 'KO' or similar self-trash, not 'TrashFromHand'.
RevealFromHand is incorrect. Should reveal from LIFE CARDS (top of deck), not hand. Needs custom action or different structure.
PlayFromHand is incorrect context. Card is revealed from life, not hand. Should be 'PlaySelf' or 'Play' action targeting revealed card.
Filter missing required conditions: must match [Portgas.D.Ace] character name AND cost of 5.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect. Text states 'until the end of your opponent's next turn' → should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' or equivalent multi-turn duration.
Target scope is 'OwnLeader' but text says 'up to 1 of your Leader' (singular). Verify if multiple leaders possible; if not, scope is correct but should clarify selection.

suggestedDsl.note: This card's core mechanic (reveal from life pile with conditional play) does not cleanly map to standard DSL. Recommend custom implementation or extension.
